title: stachys elliptica var. repens
intro: Stachys elliptica var. repens, also known as Creeping Betony, is a type of perennial herb that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, as well as to reduce pain and inflammation. Creeping Betony can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in herbal medicine to make salves and creams that can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
